self_report.correct_answer: ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) < 1·3·5···(2n-1) < ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2) holds for all positive integers n
self_report.viz_verdict: The bound curves (2n±1)/2 · (log(2n±1)−1) sandwich the partial-sum values of log(2k-1) at n=1,3,5,10, confirming the asserted double inequality.
self_report.notes: Standard Putnam 1996 B2 inequality, verified numerically by comparing log-bounds with the log of the product (computed as a partial sum of log(2k-1)).
